title: Richly Crispy Saudi Arabian Tortilla Wrap
description: A crispy and flavorful Saudi Arabian dish featuring flour tortilla, beurre-monte, and shojin-friendly ingredients, perfect for a hangover cure. This cultured dish is a unique blend of international flavors.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until they are translucent.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook until they are tender.
Add the chopped tomatoes, shojin-friendly spices, salt, and black pepper, and stir well.
In a small bowl, mix the beurre-monte with a little water to thin it out.
Brush the beurre-monte mixture onto the flour tortillas.
Place the tortillas on a baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes, or until crispy.
Fill the crispy tortillas with the vegetable mixture and top with chopped parsley.
